steps.title: Recognize the key expression
steps.content:
We're asked to find $2(x-8)$, not $x$. Notice that $2(x-8)$ already appears on the right side of the equation:
$$46=16+2(x-8)$$
This means we can isolate it directly without solving for $x$.

steps.title: Isolate by subtracting 16
steps.content:
Subtract 16 from both sides of the equation:
$$46 - 16 = 16 + 2(x-8) - 16$$
$$30 = 2(x-8)$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
